events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! His guitar work with Queen shaped generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock 'n' roll icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video killed the radio star
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became a cornerstone of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop classic
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh and vital as ever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15–18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, love and music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, hundreds of thousands gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in history.

events.title: Elvis Presley would have been 91
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year, having been born on January 8, 1935.

angles.name: Remembering the King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 today. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84 this year, having been born on November 27, 1942.

angles.name: Guitar genius tribute
angles.copy: Today we remember the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His influence on music is immeasurable.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic album cover
angles.copy: On this day in 1969, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover walk is still one of the most famous in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock icon birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the inimitable Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with that unmistakable voice.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' roll star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll energy.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971 (album released September 9, 1971).

angles.name: Imagine peace
angles.copy: On this day, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released. A song that continues to inspire hope and unity worldwide.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in your pocket
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped? Twenty-five years ago, Apple changed how we listen to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over 60 years of 007, martinis (shaken, not stirred), and iconic theme tunes.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles, was born on October 9, 1940. He passed away on December 8, 1980, and would have been 86 today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon, who would have turned 86 today. His music and message continue to resonate.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedic legend John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the one and only John Cleese! A true titan of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered 'The White Album'. What's your favourite track from this sprawling masterpiece?
